opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: There's this hard lump on the bottom of my foot that suddenly feels like I'm stepping on a sharp piece of glass every time I walk.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've had a hard bit of skin on my sole for months that I assumed was just a callus, but after being on my feet all day it suddenly became agonising to put any weight on — it's like standing on glass and I can barely walk, so I couldn't wait until morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: I first noticed a firm lump on the sole of my right foot several months ago; the severe pain only came on suddenly today after a long time standing
symptom_narrative.duration: the lump has been there for months, but the sharp, severe pain has been going on for the last several hours today
symptom_narrative.character: a hard, raised, rough-surfaced lump; when I put weight straight down on it, it's a sharp stabbing pain like stepping on glass
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain when I stand on it is severe — I can hardly put any weight on that foot
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: on the ball of my right foot, towards the big-toe side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: no pain at all when I'm resting or off my feet — it only hurts when I stand or press directly down on it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping my weight off it and walking on the outer edge of my foot
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing and pressing straight down on the lump when I walk
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever or chills and I feel well otherwise; I haven't noticed any spreading redness, swelling or pus around it
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm limping badly and walking on the side of my foot to avoid putting pressure on the lump

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: on my feet for long periods; often use communal changing rooms and showers

objective_data_offered.value: a hard, raised, rough-surfaced lump about 1 cm across on the sole of the right foot over the ball of the foot; there seem to be a few tiny dark specks within it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: shown over chat photo/video; lighting and angle limit detail and no close-up or hands-on inspection of the sole is possible

objective_data_offered.value: the pain only happens when I press straight down on it or stand on it; there is no pain when I am off my feet and none when I gently pinch the sides of the lump
no fever or chills and I feel well in myself
